sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64777" key="malako/gnaqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκό-γνᾰθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, of a horse, <sense id="n64777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">soft-mouthed</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:219" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.219</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
